title: Add WorkFlow to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [WorkFlow](https://unjustifiable-pedicellar-nadia.ngrok-free.dev/workflow/oWorRAl4sY41omgW) to build
- ผสาน Pollinations.ai กับ n8n ผ่าน Community Node เพื่อเชื่อมการสร้างภาพและการสร้างวิดีโอ มีระบบเครดิตฟรีสำหรับเริ่มใช้งาน

Fixes #10685

gist.headline: Automate the hive with n8n
gist.blurb: A new community node brings Pollinations directly into n8n workflows. Now you can automate your image and video generation pipelines with zero friction.
gist.summary: Added a new community-built n8n node to the apps showcase, enabling automated image and video generation directly within n8n workflows.
gist.impact: Creators and developers can now seamlessly integrate Pollinations' free-tier AI generation into their n8n automation pipelines.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about integrating Pollinations with n8n (a workflow automation tool). Visuals should depict Polly the bee connecting workflow nodes, gears, or pipelines alongside the Monitor Robot, symbolizing automation and seamless integration.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hard hat, connecting glowing workflow nodes with a chunky pixel robot companion. The nodes pulse with soft light, generating tiny pixel pictures and film strips. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
